title: Xs' White Netherite
description: This ResourcePack changes the standard netherite to white
body:
This resourcepack modifies the standard netherite in Minecraft by recoloring it white. This will make it easier for you to find neserite materials in the lower world.

The resourcepack is ideal for those who want to improve the visibility of netherite and make gameplay more convenient. Enjoy the new features and improve your experience in the world of Minecraft with this simple but useful change!
